title: Recovering Archived Items
excerpt:

posts.author: lma (Leo Ibarrola)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was attempting to transfer a group from one board to another, but received an error telling me that the items could not be transferred.

The items have also been removed from the original and appear to be archived, according the the activity log, but my archive history does not show any items.

image783×521 25.8 KB

Board activity log displays the items, but appear archived.

Is there a way to recover archived items if they are not viewable within my archive history?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lma

Could you please also check the Archive via the bottom left hand corner menu?

image746×980 75.7 KB

If you’re not able to find the archived data here, can you please contact our team at support@monday.com?
This will allow us to take a further look into this

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lma

Just wanted to check in and see if you were still having issues here?
We’d be happy to continue to assist if so!

If not, please do let us know so that we can go ahead and close the thread.

Best,

Dani
